en: I don't know, you know, you'll probably be about as good as I was.
ko: 너는 아마 내가 그랬던 만큼은 할 수 있을 거야.

en: That's kind of the way it works, you know, and I was below average.
So you'll probably ultimately rank somewhere around there, you know.
ko: 그러니까 너도 아마 그 정도에 머무를 거야,

en: So, really, you'll excel at a lot of things, just not this.
ko: 많은 것에서 잘할 거야, 단지 이건 아니야.

en: I don't want you out here shooting this ball around all day and night. All right?
ko: 하루 종일 이 공을 가지고 놀지 않았으면 해,

en: All right. Okay. All right, go ahead.
Don't ever let somebody tell you you can't do something.
ko: 절대 누군가가 너에게 할 수 없다고 말하게 하지 마.
